Name: Speaking & Appearance Fees
Description: Event speaker fees, emcee appearances, guest pulpit - $200-$500/engagement

Name: Sponsor Invoice Revenue
Description: Invoiced radio sponsor acknowledgements - Covenant Insurance, Mitchell's Flowers, Bluff City Auto Care

Name: Radio Program Expenses
Description: Show production costs - audio editing software, Canva graphics, promo materials

Name: Professional Development
Description: CPE continuing education, APC conference, chaplaincy journals

Name: Home Office Expense
Description: Portion of internet, phone, utilities for home office use

Name: Travel & Mileage
Description: Mileage to Beale Street studio, speaking engagements, CPE events

Name: Books & Research Materials
Description: Theology, pastoral care, faith-based books and subscriptions for show research

Name: Meals & Entertainment
Description: Business meals with guests, sponsors, and show collaborators

Name: Business Checking
Description: Checking account for radio/speaking income and business expenses

Name: Marketing & Promotion
Description: Show social media promotion, Instagram content tools, flyers for events

Name: Gifts & Ministry Supplies
Description: Cards, flowers, gifts for show guests, ministry partners, and memorial acknowledgements
